pi_items.source: Verified against FITS header TARGNAME='M16-A' from the official ESA Hubble dataset download.
Verified by reading the FITS header from the downloaded file, where PHOTMODE contains F656N (H-alpha).
Verified by reading the FITS header from the downloaded file, where PHOTMODE contains F673N ([SII]).
Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly checks for this output path.
Confirmed via export_result.sh which explicitly reads from this output path.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real Hubble Space Telescope data of the Eagle Nebula (M16), sourced from esahubble.org. The 656nmos.fits file contains H-alpha data (verified via FITS header F656N), and 673nmos.fits contains [SII] data (verified via FITS header F673N). Both files are combined to create sii_ha_ratio.fits and ratio_statistics.txt in /home/ga/AstroImages/eagle_ratio/.
